steps.title: Show crossing disciplines
steps.content: Vega's lab includes engineers, biologists, chemists, and physicists, and its research uses insights from all those fields. The blank must describe work that goes beyond traditional boundaries between disciplines.

steps.title: Reject boundary-preserving words
steps.content: Choice A would mean the work exemplifies traditional boundaries. Choice C means predicts or expects them, and Choice D means strengthens them. The remaining word means surpassing or going beyond limits, matching the cross-disciplinary context. The answer is B.
